creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thank you for your submission. While testing I have found that your port 
doesn't register all dependencies when compiling on live system: 

[corn:ports/dns/dnscrypt-proxy]# pkg-lib-check dnscrypt-proxy-1.2.0/ 
ERR:  not registered missing dependency devel/libexecinfo 

Also your port uses old ports framework (NOPORTDOCS), please convert 
this to our new framework, thanks.
